name: PF 30 Gel
notes: Mild neutral citrus. No electrolytes by design — stack with PH hydration products.

name: PF 30 Caffeine Gel
notes: Same as PF 30 with 100mg caffeine. 2:1 glucose to fructose ratio.

name: PF 90 Gel
notes: Large resealable pouch. 3 servings of PF 30 in one go.

name: Core Gel
notes: Highest sodium of any gel here at 200mg. Also includes potassium and magnesium (amounts unspecified on label).

name: Energy Gel
notes: DualCarb blend. 1:0.8 glucose to fructose ratio. Informed Sport certified.

name: Energy Gel
notes: DualCarb blend. 1:0.8 glucose to fructose ratio. Informed Sport certified.

name: Energy Gel
notes: DualCarb blend. Neutral version for flavour fatigue prevention.

name: GO Isotonic Energy Gel
notes: World's first isotonic gel. No water needed. Very low sugar (under 1g per gel).

name: GO Energy + Caffeine Gel
notes: Isotonic formula with 75mg caffeine. Best taken 10 mins before a hard effort.

name: BETA Fuel Gel
notes: Dual-source. 1:0.8 maltodextrin to fructose. Highest carb SiS gel.

name: Gel 100
notes: Hydrogel technology. 6 ingredients only. No colours, preservatives or flavours.

name: Gel 100 Caf 100
notes: Gel 100 with 100mg caffeine encapsulated in hydrogel. 7 ingredients total.

name: Gel 160
notes: Larger hydrogel format. No caffeinated version available.

name: Energy Gel
notes: 2:1 maltodextrin to fructose. Full 5 electrolytes: sodium, chloride (99mg), potassium, calcium (6mg), magnesium.

name: Energy Gel
notes: 2:1 maltodextrin to fructose. All 5 electrolytes. No added flavouring whatsoever.

name: Energy Gel (Caffeinated)
notes: 89mg natural caffeine via guarana extract. Same electrolyte profile as regular TORQ gels.

name: Energy Gel (Caffeinated)
notes: 89mg natural caffeine via guarana extract. Same electrolyte profile as regular TORQ gels.

name: Energy Gel (Caffeinated)
notes: 89mg caffeine. Made with real decaffeinated ground coffee plus guarana extract.

name: Energy Gel
notes: Made with real fruit juice. Light liquid consistency. Sea salt present but amount not specified.

name: Energy Gel Caffeine
notes: 30mg caffeine. Low dose — good for micro-dosing every 20 mins across a long run.

name: Energy Gel Caffeine
notes: 30mg caffeine. Low dose — good for micro-dosing every 20 mins across a long run.

name: SAP 25G
notes: Real food gel. Just 2 ingredients: organic Canadian maple syrup and Himalayan salt. 1:1 glucose to fructose ratio (vs 2:1 for most synthetics). Also contains calcium (29mg), manganese, zinc. Take 0-20 mins before or during exercise.

name: SAP 40G
notes: Larger format SAP. Same 2 ingredients: organic Canadian maple syrup and Himalayan salt. Full nutrition panel not yet confirmed — values estimated proportionally from SAP 25G.

name: GEL30
notes: 1:0.8 maltodextrin to fructose. Also contains L-citrulline and L-arginine for nitric oxide boost. Vegan, pH-balanced. WADA batch tested. Also available in Citrus.

name: GEL30 Nitro+
notes: Same as GEL30 with added natural nitrates for enhanced blood flow and oxygen efficiency. No caffeine.

name: GEL30 Caffeine+
notes: 150mg caffeine with L-theanine to reduce jitters. 1:0.8 maltodextrin to fructose. Vegan, WADA tested. Natural cola flavour.

name: GEL50
notes: High-carb option. Same 1:0.8 dual-carb formula as GEL30. 6 ingredients. Good for long efforts needing fewer gel stops.

name: Maple Ignite
notes: Just 2 ingredients: Grade A Canadian maple syrup and sea salt. 1:1 glucose to fructose. Also contains calcium (27mg), iron, manganese. Real food gel.

name: Maple Coffee
notes: 3 ingredients: Grade A Canadian maple syrup, coffee extract, sea salt. 45mg natural caffeine. Includes calcium, potassium, manganese. Real food.

name: Riba
notes: No maltodextrin. Real fruit syrups and juices. Informed Sport certified. Compact 33g sachet. Can dissolve in water like cordial.

name: Primo
notes: No maltodextrin. Real fruit syrups and juices. Beetroot provides natural nitrates. Informed Sport certified.

name: Tempo
notes: No maltodextrin. Date syrup, maple syrup, ginger extract. Ginger helps settle stomach during hard efforts. Informed Sport certified.

name: Doppio
notes: 75mg natural caffeine from guarana. Real coffee and maple syrup. No maltodextrin. Informed Sport certified.

name: Desto
notes: 75mg natural caffeine from guarana. Tart cherry is anti-inflammatory. No maltodextrin. Informed Sport certified.

name: Performance Gel 40/0.25
notes: Co-founded by Alistair Brownlee. 1:1 glucose to fructose. Low salt version — suited for cooler conditions or lower sweat rates. Also contains coconut water powder and tri-magnesium citrate. Neutral flavour.

name: Performance Gel 40/1.0
notes: Co-founded by Alistair Brownlee. 1:1 glucose to fructose. High salt version — 1000mg sodium is the most of any gel in this list. For hot conditions, heavy sweaters, or long races. Neutral flavour.

name: High Energy Gel
notes: 76g format. Cluster Dextrin (cyclodextrin) as primary carb source — high molecular weight, rapid gastric emptying. 1:1 complex to simple carb ratio. Also available in Banana and Neutral (no caffeine/BCAA).

name: High Energy Gel
notes: 76g format. Cyclodextrin base. Contains 1g BCAA (L-leucine 800mg, L-isoleucine 100mg, L-valine 100mg). Orange BCAA version also available.

name: High Energy Gel
notes: 76g format. 160mg caffeine — one of the highest single-gel doses on this list. Cyclodextrin base. Limit 1 per hour.

name: High Energy Gel
notes: 76g format. 80mg caffeine. Cyclodextrin base. Cologne List certified (WADA-tested).

name: High Energy Gel
notes: 76g format. 250mg sodium — higher electrolyte version. Also available as Peanut & Honey with same 250mg sodium. Cyclodextrin base.

name: High Fructose Gel
notes: 80g format. 10:8 maltodextrin to fructose ratio. 250mg sodium. Higher carb than High Energy Gel. Also in Strawberry and Cola (caffeinated).

name: Isotonic Gel
notes: 68g isotonic format. No water needed. Cyclodextrin base. Stevia sweetened. Also in Watermelon and Cola Caffeine (100mg caffeine).

name: Energy Gel
notes: Almost liquid consistency from real fruit juice concentrate. Balanced electrolytes including sodium and magnesium. Also in Lemon & Lime, Orange, Blackcurrant. Winner Runner's World 2022 Best for Flavour.

name: Caffeine Gel
notes: 100mg caffeine from natural guarana. Same base as standard OTE gel. Also available in Blackcurrant caffeinated. Informed Sport certified.

name: Super Gel
notes: 66g format. Double carbs of standard gel. Maltodextrin and fructose. Good for transitions or when time-pressed. Also in Tropical and Cherry.

name: Energy Gel
notes: Contains 50mg ginger per gel to reduce GI distress and nausea. Gluten-free, vegan, all-natural. Also in Rhubarb (non-caffeinated) and Citrus (50mg caffeine).

name: Energy Gel
notes: 50mg caffeine version. Same 50mg ginger formula as non-caffeinated. Lower caffeine dose suits micro-dosing strategy.

name: Chia Energy Gel
notes: Real food gel. Very different to synthetic gels — only 11g carbs but 5g fibre, 2.3g protein, 4g fat from chia seeds. Slow-release. Designed for ultras and longer low-intensity efforts. Not a direct replacement for carb-dense gels.
